hero.subtitle1: A multi-tenant web application for tracking utility bills across multiple properties — apartments, houses, summer homes. Log meter readings, record bills and payments, see balances and consumption analytics over time.
hero.subtitle2: Built as a portfolio piece and a real product. The first user is the author's wife, who's been tracking two apartments in a paper notebook for years.

dashboardSection.caption: Dashboard. Balance summary across all properties, expense breakdown by service, monthly trends, and consumption analytics with switchable money/units view.

features.sectionTitle: Built around how households actually work
features.propertiesBody: Track multiple properties — apartments, houses, summer homes — and share access with family at owner, editor, or viewer level.
features.tariffsBody: Every tariff, account number, and payment detail is stored with its validity period. Recompute past months correctly even after rates change.
features.walletTitle: Bills and payments as a ledger
features.walletBody: Bills and payments are independent records. Balance is derived. No forced "this payment pays that bill" links — just the math, the way real households do it.
features.trendsBody: Pie, stacked bar, and line charts show where money goes, how consumption shifts month to month, and whether things are getting better or worse.

propertySection.caption: Property detail. Each property holds its own services with full contract history — provider changes, tariff changes, account number changes, all preserved.

auth.signInSubtitle: Track your utility bills across properties.
auth.tryDemoHint: View a sample workspace. No account needed.

error.title: Sign-in didn't complete
error.description: Access was denied during the sign-in process. This usually happens when sign-in is canceled or permission is declined.
